summary: Completed initial testing of MemoraAI (forked from RealApex SaaS). All backend APIs working correctly. Fixed frontend password login bug. All 7 requested features verified.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - Login.js was sending 'email' key instead of 'phone' for phone number login

issues: Frontend still shows 'RealApex' branding - expected per requirements, needs rebranding to 'MemoraAI' in future

action_items: Consider rebranding frontend from 'RealApex' to 'MemoraAI' when ready
critical_code_review_comments: Login.js line 129-132: Fixed bug where phone numbers were being sent as 'email' key instead of 'phone' key to backend API
seed_data_creation: Seed data already populated from fork - includes roles, currencies, categories, default tenant, and test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: MemoraAI is a fork of RealApex SaaS. Backend uses FastAPI on port 8001, frontend React on port 3000, MongoDB 'memoraai'. Auth supports both OTP (primary) and password (secondary) login. Test users have password 'admin123'. Password login bug was fixed in Login.js.

features_tested.auth_login_with_password: PASS - POST /api/auth/login with phone=8888888888 and password=admin123 returns access_token
features_tested.auth_otp_send: PASS - POST /api/auth/send-otp with phone=8888888888 returns OTP
features_tested.frontend_landing_page: PASS - Landing page loads correctly at root URL
features_tested.frontend_login_page: PASS - Login page accessible with OTP and password options
features_tested.frontend_register_page: PASS - Register page accessible with proper form fields
